sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ صَالِحٌ أَنْ يَقْرَأَ الْأَخْبَارَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je ujutro htio čitati vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: Salih wanted to read the news in the morning.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je aplikaciju za vijesti na telefonu.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the news app on his phone.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الْعُنَاوِينَ الرَّئِيسِيَّةَ وَاخْتَارَ خَبَرًا وَاحِدًا.
sentences.translation: Pročitao je glavne naslove i odabrao jednu vijest.
sentences.translationEn: He read the main headlines and chose one news story.

sentences.translation: Pažljivo ga pročitao pa zatvorio aplikaciju.
sentences.translationEn: He read it attentively then closed the app.
